creator: wollman@csail.mit.edu
text:
/usr/local/etc/periodic/daily/400.status-pkg is enabled by the
periodic.conf variable weekly_status_pkg_enable.

Fix: 

Change the name of the variable to reflect the fact that it's a daily
script, not a weekly one.
How-To-Repeat: 
Set 'daily_status_pkg_enable="YES"' in /etc/periodic.conf.
